positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a celestial forest at twilight. Central composition featuring intertwined branches forming the silhouettes of constellations and mythical bioluminescent flora. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, sapphire blue, vibrant teal, and touches of glowing gold. The style should be highly detailed vector art combined with ethereal watercolor gradients, providing strong contrast and a clean, print-friendly silhouette aesthetic. Suitable for apparel print, featuring clean edges and repeatable patterns. Intricate detail, maximalism, symmetry, trending on ArtStation.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, blurry, grain, noise, bad anatomy, disfigured, artifacts, cropped, lowres, extra limbs, messy background, realistic photography, photorealism, jpeg artifacts
